raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehniſch fehde-
ja Seemas-Nanna deiwitâ
Mehneſi/un Ugguns bija preeſch
winna Ugguns-Kurri eededſi-
nahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Juhdi trihs jeb
tſchetrus Gabbalus bij laſſijs/
fagreefe wiſch to ar Spalwu-
Nafi/ un mette to Ugguni/ kaſ
us Ugguns Kurri bija/ teekams
wiſſa Grahmata fadeds eekſch
fa ugguns/ kaſ Ugguns-Kurri
bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee ne iſbihjajahs/
neds faplohsſija fawas Drehbes/
ne tas Kehniſch nedś wiſſi win-
na Kalpi / kaſ wiſſus ſchohs
Wahrduß bij dſrdejscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jepſchu arridsan Elna-
tans/ un Delajus/ un Gemari-
jus pee ta Kehniſa par to run-
naja/ ka tam to Grahnatu ne
bij fadedſinaht/ tomehr wiſsch
tecm ne klaufſia.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl pawebleja tas Keh-
niſch Jerameetam Ameleka
Dehſam/ un Serajum Asrieta
Dehſam/ un Selantjum Abdee-
ta Dehſam/ to Rafstitaju Bah-
ruku/ un to Praweetu Jeremi-
ju grabbt/ bet tas KUNGS bij
tohs apflehpis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad notikee ta KUNga
Wahrds uhs Jeremiju/ pehz ka
tas Kehniſch to Grahnatu/ un
tohs Wahrds/ ko Bahruks no
Jeremijus Muttes bij rakſtijs/
bij fadedſinajs/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wenn zittu Grahnatu /
rakſti us to wiſſus pirnu
Wahrds/ kaſ tai pirma Gra-
matâ stahweja/ ko Jojakims ta
Kehniſch no Juhda irr faded-
najs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fakki no Jojakima
Kehniſa no Juhda : Ta fak-
tas KUNGS: Tu eſſi ſa
Grahnatu fadedſinajs/ un fa-
zijs : Raphz eſſi tu uhs to ra-
ſtijs/ un fazzijis: Tas Kehniſ-
ta ugguns/ kaſ Ugguns-Kurri
no Babetes nahks/ un tamaita-
icho Semmi/ un darrihs/
neds Zilweki/ neds Lehypi eek-
tahs paliks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Taphz fakka tas KUNG-
ta no Jojakima ta Kehniſa
Juhda: Winnam neweens buh-
kaſ us Dahwida Goda-Krel
lu ſehdehs/ un wiſſa nomirr-
ſi Meeta tapś nohſimesta za-
Deenu Karstunâ/ un zaur Na-
Aufſtuma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un eß peemekeſchu-
winnâ/ un pee winna Osimu-
ma/ un pee winna Kalpeem wi-
no Noseegunu / un wedif-
pahr teem/ un pahr Jeruſalem-
Eedsihwotajeem/ un pahr wiſſe-
Wihreem no Juhda/ wiſſu
Laununu/ ko eß prett teem ef-
runnajs/ bet tee ne irr klaufijs-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme Jeremij-
zittu Grahnatu / un deive
Bahrukam Nerijus Dehla-
tam Rafstitajam / tas rakſti-
us to no Jeremijus Muttes w-
fus Wahrds tahs Grahnata-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
